assessment_config.description: Loaded prompt, mode, language, privacy, and threshold config.

assessment_battery.description: Age-based assessment battery selected from user-provided age at start.

recording.description: Raw recording reference and capture metadata.

audio_quality.description: Volume, noise, VAD, retry, and quality status.

transcript.description: STT transcript, word timestamps, language confidence, and evidence.

hinglish_nlp.description: Normalized reference/spoken text and token-level language/script tags.

alignment.description: Reference-guided word/character alignment and uncertain spans.

phoneme_analysis.description: Expected phonemes, hypothesis, target issues, and tolerance profile.

scores.description: Gentle multi-dimensional scores and developmental label.

task_results.description: Per-prompt results when an age-selected assessment battery is run.

feedback.description: Separated child/adult feedback and suggested practice.

human_review.description: Human review routing state and reason.

child_result.description: Child-safe result payload with no raw percentages.

adult_report.description: Parent/teacher report with evidence, uncertainty, and scores.

full_report.description: Full educational report with domain insights, uncertainty, and exercises.
